mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY ${sidx} ${sord}) RowNo, a.* FROM ( SELECT w.*, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM mailSendList m WHERE m.mailSendListPage = 'workmanage' AND m.mailSendListPageNumber = w.workManageKeyNum ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS mailSendYn FROM workmanage w
) a ) b WHERE b.RowNo between (1+(${page} - 1 ) * ${rows}) and (${page} * ${rows});
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO workManage( workManageCustomer, workManageProductType, workManageProductTypeCount, workManagePackageName, workManagePackageFileName, workManagePackageSize, workManageEngineer, workManageDivision, workManageRequestDate, workManageCompleteDate, workManageAuthor, workManageTester, workManageProgressStatus, workManageProgress, workManageTestScheduleStart, workManageTestScheduleEnd, workManageOneLine, workManageDetailNote, workManageRegistrant, workManageRegistrationDate ) VALUES( #{workManageCustomerView}, #{workManageProductType}, #{workManageProductTypeCount}, #{workManagePackageName}, #{workManagePackageFileName}, #{workManagePackageSize}, #{workManageEngineerView}, #{workManageDivisionView}, #{workManageRequestDateView}, #{workManageCompleteDateView}, #{workManageAuthorView}, #{workManageTesterView}, #{workManageProgressStatusView}, #{workManageProgressView}, #{workManageTestScheduleStart}, #{workManageTestScheduleEnd}, #{workManageOneLineView}, #{workManageDetailNoteView}, #{workManageRegistrant}, #{workManageRegistrationDate} );
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workmanage WHERE workManageCustomer = #{workManageCustomer} AND workManageTester LIKE '%${employeeName}%' AND workManageTestScheduleStart <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (6 - WEEKDAY(CURDATE())) DAY) AND workManageTestScheduleEnd >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) ORDER BY workManageTestScheduleStart ASC;

SELECT * FROM workmanage WHERE workManageCustomer = #{workManageCustomer} AND workManageTester LIKE '%${employeeName}%' AND workManageProgress != 100 AND workManageTestScheduleEnd >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL WEEKDAY(CURDATE()) DAY) ORDER BY workManageTestScheduleStart ASC;
mapper.update: UPDATE workmanage SET workManageDelReaon = #{workManageDelReaon}, workManageDelFlag = 'Y' WHERE workManageKeyNum = #{workManageKeyNum};
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM workmanage WHERE workManageTester LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeName}, '%') AND workManageTestScheduleStart <= CURDATE() AND workManageTestScheduleEnd >= CURDATE()

SELECT * FROM workmanage WHERE workManageTester LIKE CONCAT('%', #{employeeName}, '%') AND workManageTestScheduleStart <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AND workManageTestScheduleEnd >= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
